_comment: Normalizes the Xoro item-level GL account NAMES (from the CurrentProducts GL export, keyed by BasePartNumber) onto the Tangerine ROF chart-of-accounts CODES. All target accounts already exist in gl_accounts. Match is by Xoro account NAME -> Tangerine code. NOTE: Xoro 'AdjAccountName' = '5006 General and Administrative:Inventory Adjustments Expense' is a XORO code; it maps by NAME to Tangerine code 6343 (Tangerine 5006 is a different account = Disassemble Offset).
